name: Duval County Public Schools
districtFact: Duval County Public Schools serves Jacksonville and surrounding Duval County communities in Northeast Florida, where families often coordinate school breaks with coastal travel, military schedules, weather-day planning, and after-school care across a large urban and coastal district.

about.title: About Duval County Public Schools
about.content: Duval County Public Schools serves students across Jacksonville and Duval County, Florida. The district publishes school-year calendar dates online with first day, last day, holidays, weather days, planning days, teacher workdays, breaks, and grading-period dates. For calendar planning, Jacksonville families often need to separate student attendance dates from employee planning days, professional development days, and weather-day placeholders.

about.title: How to Use This Duval Calendar
about.content: This page summarizes the Duval County Public Schools online calendar pages and provides a one-time calendar import for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook. DCPS did not provide a downloadable PDF for these school years on the supplied calendar pages, so this reference links back to the district online calendar source and explains the PDF status for families looking for a printable file.

planningTips.title: Planning Tips for Duval Families
content: Use the DCPS online calendar page as the source of record because Duval posts these school-year calendars as webpages rather than downloadable PDFs.
Track weather days separately from holidays because Florida districts may use them differently after tropical storm or hurricane closures.
Add planning days and teacher workdays to family calendars because they create no-school weekdays outside major breaks.
Confirm school-specific orientation, testing, athletics, and graduation dates through DCPS and the assigned campus.

customSections.label: Important Dates for Duval County Families
customSections.content: Duval County families usually need more than the first day and spring break. The online DCPS calendar separates student attendance dates from employee planning, professional development, weather days, and office-closure dates, which can affect childcare, work schedules, and after-school activities in Jacksonville.

groups.label: Parent planning checkpoints
items: Treat employee planning and professional development days as student no-school weekdays unless your school announces a different program schedule.
Track weather days separately from holidays because Duval may use or revise them after hurricane-season closures or district announcements.
Use the Google Calendar .ics import for family planning, but remember it is a one-time import and will not automatically update if DCPS revises the online calendar.
Families searching for a Duval County school calendar PDF should use the district online calendar source on this page; no official PDF was supplied for this school year in the source data.

customSections.label: Printable Duval County School Calendar 2026-2027
customSections.content: Looking for a printable Duval County school calendar PDF? The reviewed DCPS source for 2026-2027 is an online calendar page rather than a supplied PDF file. Families can print this page, use the district online calendar source, or download the one-time .ics file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, iPhone, or Android.

groups.label: Printable calendar options
items: Print this MySchoolDates page if you need a printable list of Duval County first day, holidays, breaks, planning days, weather days, and last day.
Use the linked DCPS online calendar source for the district calendar record and any later revisions.
Use the .ics download when you want a one-time Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, iPhone, or Android import instead of a PDF.

customSections.label: Jacksonville Weather and Campus Calendar Notes
customSections.content: Jacksonville families should read the DCPS calendar together with campus notices because weather-day placeholders, magnet program dates, athletics, testing, and graduation events may be handled outside the districtwide calendar page. This is especially important during Northeast Florida hurricane season, when weather-related changes can affect childcare and commute planning.

groups.label: Local calendar checks
items: Watch DCPS weather-day notices during hurricane season because listed weather days may change if the district needs make-up time.
Check your assigned campus for bell schedules, orientation, athletics, testing, and graduation dates that do not always appear on the districtwide calendar page.
Families in magnet, choice, or specialized programs should confirm program-level dates before relying only on the districtwide school calendar.

compareIntro: Compare the Duval County school calendar with other Florida district calendars currently available on MySchoolDates. Dates shown include the first day, last day, and spring break.

districtFaqs.q: Which Duval County calendar does this page summarize?
districtFaqs.a: This page summarizes the Duval County Public Schools online school-year calendar pages, including first day, last day, holidays, planning days, teacher workdays, weather days, breaks, and grading-period dates.

districtFaqs.q: Does Duval County publish a PDF calendar?
districtFaqs.a: The supplied Duval County calendar pages are district online calendar pages. This page does not list a PDF download because no PDF was provided for these school years on those pages.

districtFaqs.q: What are Duval County weather days?
districtFaqs.a: Duval lists weather days on the official calendar. Families should treat them as calendar-specific dates that may be affected by storm make-up needs or district announcements.

districtFaqs.q: Where should families verify last-minute Duval calendar changes?
districtFaqs.a: Use the official Duval County Public Schools events page and school-level announcements for final confirmation. MySchoolDates is an independent reference and is not affiliated with DCPS.
